nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, qp.total_marks, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.max_marks IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT akr.question_id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.preparer_id) AS num_preparers, ak.approved_status, au.display_name FROM question_paper qp JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED' JOIN answer_key_rubric akr ON akr.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.assignment_id = ea.assignment_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = fc.app_user_id GROUP BY qp.title, qp.total_marks, ak.approved_status, au.display_name
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_key.approved_status, answer_key.approved_status, faculty_cache.app_user_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
